ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie (e.g., Action, Drama) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the movie */,
  "score" REAL /* Average user rating of the movie */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of user votes for the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer of the movie */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main star of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the movie was released */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie in USD */,
  "gross" REAL /* Gross box office earnings of the movie in USD */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "year_correct" TEXT /* Corrected year of release (if different from the original year) */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "plot_summary" TEXT /* Short summary of the movie plot */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "collections" REAL /* Total box office collections of the movie in USD */,
  "opening_weekend" REAL /* Opening weekend box office earnings of the movie in USD */,
  "opening_weekend_date" TEXT /* Date of the opening weekend of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_star_id FOREIGN KEY ("star_id") REFERENCES stars ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the director was born */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of notable awards won by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the writer was born */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the writer */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of notable awards won by the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stars" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "star_name" TEXT /* Full name of the star */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the star was born */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the star */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the star */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of notable awards won by the star */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company's activities and mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the box office earnings */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Box office earnings of the movie on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id")
)
